properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V2 C3 V4 V5 C3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Under Your grace, Your mercy amazes me Under Your wing, Your shadow covers me Your promise of love where my heart is safely undone

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Speak to me, Lord, Your servant is listening Over the noise, I hear You whispering My hope has come and my heart is safely undone

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: I've found my fortress in You And my soul is anchored with You My resting place is in Your name Forever safe

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Forever safe Forever safe Forever safe

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: You are never far away Always reaching out to save My weakness covered by Your strength And I am found forever safe
